message:
fix: batch security and correctness fixes (#5344, #5346-5351) (#5368)

* fix: batch security and correctness fixes (#5344, #5346-5351)

- Implement ListAgents() via HTTP API instead of returning empty stub (#5346)
- Add proper HTTP status codes to error responses in feedback handlers (#5347)
- Add Authorization header to all kc-agent fetch calls via agentFetch helper (#5348)
- URL-encode namespace/agent path segments in kagenti_provider client (#5349)
- Add startup warning when KC_AGENT_TOKEN is not set (#5351)
- Fix useMissions test to expect pre-populated demo missions (#5344)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* test: add tests for useMediumBlog, mission scanner, and stats formatters

- New test for useMediumBlog hook covering fetch, cache, and error handling
- New test for mission scanner standalone module (scanMissionFile, formatScanResultAsMarkdown)
- Comprehensive tests for stats/types formatters (formatStatNumber, formatBytes, formatPercent, formatCurrency, formatDuration, formatValue)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* test: extend kagentiProviderBackend tests with chat streaming coverage

Add tests for kagentiProviderChat covering SSE streaming, error handling,
abort behavior, and contextId passthrough.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
